mapper.select: select config_scope, vector_enabled, embedding_model_profile_id, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at from query_vector_settings where config_scope = #{configScope}
mapper.insert: insert into query_vector_settings ( config_scope, vector_enabled, embedding_model_profile_id, created_by, updated_by ) values ( #{record.configScope}, #{record.vectorEnabled}, #{record.embeddingModelProfileId}, #{record.createdBy}, #{record.updatedBy} )
mapper.update: update query_vector_settings set vector_enabled = #{record.vectorEnabled}, embedding_model_profile_id = #{record.embeddingModelProfileId}, updated_by = #{record.updatedBy}, updated_at = current_timestamp where config_scope = #{record.configScope}
